task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the OpenEMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR dashboard, calendar view, or main navigation menu is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Document Categories management page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Document Categories', 'Categories', or a similar administrative interface showing a tree/list of document folders is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the specific category name 'Prior Authorizations' into the creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field (often labeled 'Name') is populated with the text 'Prior Authorizations' before saving.

task_completion.description: The new category 'Prior Authorizations' appears in the saved category tree.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Prior Authorizations' is visible as a node or item within the document category tree structure or list.

integrity.description: Agent completed the task using the GUI, not terminal commands or SQL injection.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser; no terminal, command prompt, or database client windows are active.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the visual style of OpenEMR (colors, fonts, layout) and is not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: The category was created during the session, not pre-existing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen performing the 'Add' or 'Save' action, rather than just navigating to an already existing category.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected category name is 'Prior Authorizations'. The VLM must verify this exact spelling appears in the category tree or input field.
